name: closet-x

scripts.install:all: npm run install:services && npm run install:workers
scripts.install:services: cd services/user-service && npm install && cd ../wardrobe-service && npm install && cd ../outfit-service && npm install && cd ../ai-advice-service && pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.install:workers: cd workers/image-processor && npm install && cd ../outfit-generator && npm install && cd ../fashion-advice && npm install
scripts.test:unit: npm run test:services && npm run test:workers
scripts.test:services: cd services/user-service && npm test && cd ../wardrobe-service && npm test && cd ../outfit-service && npm test
scripts.test:workers: cd workers/image-processor && npm test && cd ../outfit-generator && npm test && cd ../fashion-advice && npm test
scripts.test:all: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration && npm run test:e2e
scripts.lint: npm run lint:services && npm run lint:workers
scripts.lint:services: cd services/user-service && npm run lint || true && cd ../wardrobe-service && npm run lint || true && cd ../outfit-service && npm run lint || true
scripts.lint:workers: cd workers/image-processor && npm run lint || true

author: Team Kates - Aleksandra Postolova, Kuany Kuany, Hanna Saffi
